what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content
Target is a board:// URI pointing to item-a08aefde
Added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: It is a board_items attachment in the dragnet-development channel
conventions: Target identifier uses a board:// URI scheme
Timestamp uses ISO 8601 with explicit timezone
notes: A metadata stub that records a board-item attachment reference in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What is the semantic content or relationship represented by board://item-a08aefde?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it is a channel attachment record for a board item.
intention_signals: To persist a machine-readable reference from a channel to a specific board item.
contribution: Provides a durable, addressable metadata record that links a channel attachment to a board item target and records its creation time.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file for the dragnet-development channel referencing board item item-a08aefde via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To record when and how a board item was attached to the dragnet-development channel.
